/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wall  -Wsuggest-override -Werror=vla -pthread -Wshadow -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,-Bsymbolic -shared  -o libs3d_plugin_idf.so CMakeFiles/s3d_plugin_idf.dir/s3d_plugin_idf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/s3d_plugin_idf.dir/__/__/__/utils/idftools/vrml_layer.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/kicad/program/V5/Tears_V5_S/build/3d-viewer/3d_cache/sg: ../../../3d-viewer/3d_cache/sg/libkicad_3dsg.so.2.0.0 ../../../utils/idftools/libidf3.a ../../../common/libcommon.a -lGL -lGLU -pthread -lwx_gtk2u_gl-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_aui-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_adv-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_html-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_core-3.0 -lwx_baseu_net-3.0 -lwx_baseu-3.0 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_stc-3.0 ../../../common/libgal.a ../../../bitmaps_png/libbitmaps.a ../../../polygon/libpolygon.a -lGLEW -lcairo -lpixman-1 -lGL -lGLU -lcurl -lssl -lcrypto -lwx_gtk2u_gl-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_aui-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_adv-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_html-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_core-3.0 -lwx_baseu_net-3.0 -lwx_baseu-3.0 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.0 -lwx_gtk2u_stc-3.0
